title: Thai Mozzarella Pizza
description: A Thai-inspired take on the classic pizza, featuring mozzarella cheese and a crispy crust.
instructions: Roll out the pizza dough and place on a baking sheet.
Spread the greek tomato sauce over the dough, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the pizza sauce over the tomato sauce.
Top with the buttery mozzarella cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with green onions.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the onions are slightly caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
